name: Hacker News
description: Adds Hacker News top, new, and Ask HN story table tools for approved threads.

access.name: Hacker News - Top Stories
access.description: Expose the top_stories tool to selected threads.

tools.name: top_stories
tools.description: Fetch all current Hacker News top story IDs, load their item metadata, and return a markdown table.

access.name: Hacker News - New Stories
access.description: Expose the new_stores tool to selected threads.

tools.name: new_stores
tools.description: Fetch all current Hacker News new story IDs, load their item metadata, and return a markdown table. The tool id keeps the requested new_stores spelling.

access.name: Hacker News - Ask Stories
access.description: Expose the ask_stories tool to selected threads.

tools.name: ask_stories
tools.description: Fetch all current Hacker News Ask HN story IDs, load their item metadata, and return a markdown table.
